scripts.deploy:mainnets: source ./.env && export START_TIME=$(date +%s) && npx sphinx propose ./script/Deploy.s.sol --networks mainnets
scripts.deploy:testnets: source ./.env && export START_TIME=$(date +%s) && npx sphinx propose ./script/Deploy.s.sol --networks testnets
scripts.deploy:mainnets:5_1: source ./.env && export START_TIME=$(date +%s) && npx sphinx propose ./script/Deploy5_1.s.sol --networks mainnets
scripts.deploy:testnets:5_1: source ./.env && export START_TIME=$(date +%s) && npx sphinx propose ./script/Deploy5_1.s.sol --networks testnets
